validation.notes: Present: system.operation.rate_limit.violation=23, system.client.concurrency_rate_limit.violation=20, system.client.rate_limit.violation=3 over 90d. The Panther rule fnmatches a set of rate-limit patterns but additionally requires 'violation' in the eventType - so the warning/exceeded variants (e.g. app.oauth2.client_id_rate_limit_warning) never actually match. Reproduced here with contains 'limit' AND contains 'violation', which captures exactly the matching event family.
